hooks.command: PROJECT=$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); terminal-notifier -message "Waiting for input in $PROJECT" -title "Claude Code" -sound Frog -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty; if [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ]; then tmux select-window -t "$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#{window_id}')" 2>/dev/null; tmux select-pane -t "$TMUX_PANE" 2>/dev/null; fi

PROJECT=$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); terminal-notifier -message "Finished in $PROJECT" -title "Claude Code" -sound Frog -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty; if [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ]; then tmux select-window -t "$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#{window_id}')" 2>/dev/null; tmux select-pane -t "$TMUX_PANE" 2>/dev/null; fi
